name: Cabbage Cooked with Bean Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the mushrooms in 3/4 cup hot water for 30 minutes.
2. Place the tofu on a paper towel and leave to drain for 30 minutes.
3. Remove the mushrooms from the water, reserving the liquid. Cut off and discard the stems. Slice the caps into 1/4-inch wide strips.
4. Heat the oil in an 8-inch skillet. When hot, add the cabbage and mushrooms. Stir and fry for 1 minute until the cabbage wilts.
5. Reduce the heat to medium. Crumble the tofu into the skillet.
6. Add salt, soy sauce, and mirin. Stir and fry for another 5 minutes.
